title: Generating a Decision Tree for Classifying Customer Segments Based on Multi-Dimensional Data
scenario: Develop a system to generate a decision tree for classifying customer segments based on multi-dimensional data such as demographics, behavioral data, and transactional data. The decision tree should be able to handle complex relationships between these attributes and enable efficient segmentation of customers.
constraints: Must use a recursive approach to generate the decision tree

evaluationCriteria.description: The decision tree should accurately represent the relationships between attributes and enable efficient segmentation of customers.
The recursive approach should be correctly implemented to generate the decision tree.
The decision tree should handle complex relationships between attributes correctly.
The decision tree should be easy to read and understand.
